mission.title: clickhouse: Add native Prometheus metrics endpoint
mission.description: Add native Prometheus metrics endpoint. Requested by 98+ users.

steps.title: Check current ClickHouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your ClickHouse version:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires ClickHouse with native Prometheus support.

steps.title: Review Prometheus metrics configuration
steps.description:
ClickHouse added a native Prometheus metrics endpoint. Add this to your server configuration:
```xml
<prometheus>
    <endpoint>/metrics</endpoint>
    <port>9363</port>
    <metrics>true</metrics>
    <events>true</events>
    <asynchronous_metrics>true</asynchronous_metrics>
</prometheus>
```

steps.title: Enable the Prometheus endpoint
steps.description:
After updating the configuration, restart ClickHouse:
```bash
sudo systemctl restart clickhouse-server
```

Test the endpoint:
```bash
curl http://localhost:9363/metrics | head -20
```

steps.title: Verify Prometheus integration
steps.description:
Confirm metrics are served in Prometheus format:
```bash
curl -s http://localhost:9363/metrics | grep "^ClickHouse" | head -10
```
Configure your Prometheus scrape target to point at this endpoint.

resolution.summary: ClickHouse added a native Prometheus metrics endpoint configurable via server settings, serving metrics, events, and asynchronous metrics in Prometheus format.
